settings.text: Find some of the most common questions about Coastline right here.

settings.title: What does “healthspan” mean?
settings.text: Healthspan is the length of time you live with vitality, clarity, and independence — not just lifespan. Coastline is built to support the systems that decline with age: energy metabolism, mood, sleep, inflammation, joints, skin, and cognition. The goal isn’t just to live longer — it’s to live better.

settings.title: How safe are these ingredients?
settings.text: All ingredients are used at levels shown to be safe and effective in human studies. All products are third-party tested for purity and potency.

settings.title: What kind of results can I expect — and when?
settings.text: Most people feel improvements in sleep, focus, and energy within the first 1–2 weeks. Deeper benefits — like joint support, skin resilience, and gut health — build gradually with consistent daily use. Think long-term investment, not overnight fix.

settings.title: What if I miss a day?
settings.text: No problem. Longevity is about consistency, not perfection. Just resume your regular routine the next day — your body will thank you over time.

settings.title: Are your products vegan and allergen-friendly?
settings.text: Yes — all Coastline Longevity products are 100% vegan, non-GMO, and free from major allergens like gluten, soy, and dairy. Even ingredients like glucosamine, which are often sourced from shellfish, are vegan-certified in our formulas.

settings.title: Why are the ingredients split into morning and evening formulas?
settings.text: Your body follows a circadian rhythm, and our formulas are designed to align with it. We include energizing ingredients like creatine and magnesium in the Morning Blend, and calming, recovery-oriented ingredients like L-theanine and lithium orotate in the Evening Capsules to help your body perform and recover optimally.

settings.title: Is this safe to take with other supplements or medications?
settings.text: While our ingredients are generally safe and well-tolerated, we recommend consulting your healthcare provider if you’re on medication or taking other supplements with overlapping ingredients (like magnesium, glycine, or lithium). Always best to double-check.

settings.title: Is Coastline safe for both men and women? What age is it for?
settings.text: Yes — Coastline is designed for all adults looking to support their healthspan. Most users are 30+, but anyone focused on long-term vitality can benefit from our system. It’s safe and effective for both men and women.

settings.title: Can I take this while pregnant or breastfeeding?
settings.text: If you are pregnant, nursing, or planning to be, please consult your doctor before taking Coastline. While our ingredients are generally safe, this is an important step with any supplement.

settings.title: Does the inulin in the Morning Blend cause bloating or digestive discomfort?
settings.text: Inulin is a prebiotic fiber that supports gut health — but for some people, it can temporarily cause bloating or gassiness, especially if your diet is low in fiber. This usually fades as your gut adjusts. If you’re sensitive, start with a half scoop of the Morning Blend for a few days and build up gradually.

settings.title: How many pills and scoops do I take each day?
settings.text:
It’s simple:
- Morning: 1 scoop of Morning Blend powder, mixed with water + 1 softgel.
- Evening: 2 capsules with or after dinner.
That’s it — 1 scoop + 3 pills a day for full coverage.

settings.title: Do I need to take the powder with food?
settings.text: You don’t have to, but many people find it more comfortable on a full stomach. Feel free to mix it with your morning smoothie or drink it on its own after breakfast.

settings.title: Can I pause or cancel my subscription anytime?
settings.text: Yes, absolutely. With Coastline you can adjust the frequency of delivery (1-3 months) and/or cancel anytime.

settings.title: What is your refund policy?
settings.text: We stand behind our products and want you to feel confident trying Coastline. If you’re not satisfied for any reason, just reach out to our customer support team within 30 days of your order, and we’ll issue a full refund — no questions asked

settings.title: Do you ship internationally?
settings.text: Coastline is currently available to customers in the USA and Canada. If you are outside the USA or Canada and are interested in having Coastline shipped to your address, please send us an email at support@coastlinelongevity.com and we can provide details on shipping fees to your location.

settings.title: What can I mix the unflavored Morning Blend with?
settings.text: We love to add it to our protein shakes, smoothies, juice, flavored waters or any other cold beverage. It has a very mild taste so just about any cold drink will work well.

settings.title: Can I take Coastline Longevity products with other supplements?
settings.text: Our supplements are designed to complement a balanced lifestyle and can be taken alongside other vitamins and minerals. If you are taking prescription medications or have a medical condition, consult your healthcare provider before adding any new supplement.

settings.title: How should I store the supplements?
settings.text: Store supplements in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and out of reach of children. Do not use if the seal is broken or missing.

settings.title: Why isn’t this available on Amazon or in stores?
settings.text: We sell exclusively through our website to maintain full control over quality, freshness, and customer experience. No middlemen, no price games — just direct support from our team to you.

settings.title: Do you test for safety, purity and heavy metals?
settings.text: Yes. We follow strict third-party testing protocols to ensure all products meet standards for purity, potency, heavy metals, and microbial safety. Everything is manufactured in certified cGMP facilities.

settings.title: Where do you source your magnesium and other minerals?
settings.text: We use highly bioavailable, vegan-friendly forms like magnesium citrate, which has been shown to support energy, sleep, and muscle function. All minerals in our formulas are selected for purity, absorption, and consistency. No fillers or shortcuts — just what your body needs.

settings.heading: Have another question?
settings.text: Don't hestitate to contact us
